case_title: LUIS SEGURA VS. SANDRA P. YOCASTELLANOS

docket_entries.description: (SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT YOSCASTELLANOS, SANDRA P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-26-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LUIS SEGURA. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SANDRA P. YOCASTELLANOS. DEFENDANT REQUESTS SPANISH INTERPRETER. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGURA, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOSCASTELLANOS, SANDRA P. $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE:$0 SERVED NOV-14-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOSCASTELLANOS, SANDRA P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/26/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY SEGURA, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT YOSCASTELLANOS, SANDRA P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEGURA, LUIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
(SC-221) RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEGURA, LUIS
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT TO JANUARY 26, 2017 AT 3:30 FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO FEB-03-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TO PROVIDE A SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF LUIS SEGURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA P. YOCASTELLANOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LUIS SEGURA IS PRESENT. SANDRA YOCASTELLANOS IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER, SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT YOSCASTELLANOS, SANDRA P.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: $300.00 TO BE PAID ON THE 20TH DAY OF THE MONTH, BEGINNING 4/20/17 AND ENDING ON 3/20/18. FINAL PAYMENT: $250.00
